articleBriefs.title: Lovable Review
articleBriefs.requiredEvidence: SaaS MVP benchmark run, current pricing snapshot, screenshots, deploy notes, generated app limitations, security and handoff notes.
articleBriefs.angle: Determine whether Lovable is the best prompt-to-app builder for nontechnical founders in 2026 using repeatable build evidence instead of marketing claims.
articleBriefs.publishGate: Do not publish until benchmark evidence, pricing evidence, screenshots, and production-readiness notes are attached.
